name: Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC)
description: Mandatory pre-arrival digital form for all non-Thai nationals entering Thailand by air, land, or sea. Replaces the paper TM6 form effective 1 May 2025. Must be submitted online at tdac.immigration.go.th within 3 days (72 hours) before arrival. The system covers personal details, trip information, accommodation, and a health declaration. A QR-code confirmation must be presented to immigration officers on arrival. Free of charge via the official portal.

name: Thai Customs Declaration
description: Passengers carrying goods that exceed duty-free allowances (e.g. cash or negotiable instruments above THB 450,000, goods for commercial use, controlled items) must complete a Customs Declaration at the Thai Customs red channel on arrival. Duty-free personal allowances include up to 200 cigarettes (or 250 g tobacco) and 1 litre of alcohol. Prohibited items such as electronic cigarettes must never be imported. The declaration is handled at the port of entry and is separate from the TDAC.
